summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 05/06/2023
DCE iron ore futures rose today by 2.15%.the main contract I2309 closed 759. some traders were active to sell, steel mills purchasedon demand. today's overall market transaction atmosphere in general.
